project_type: React + TypeScript board game SPA with WebSocket multiplayer server
test_framework: No test framework configured - validation via TypeScript compilation and Vite build
build_command: cd /projects/sandbox/shoguns-ascent && npx tsc -b && npx vite build
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'npx tsc -b' for type checking. 2. Run 'npx vite build' to verify the project builds. 3. Check no TypeScript errors.
environment_constraints: Node.js v22.22.3 available. OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Vite 8 + TypeScript 6 compatible with this Node.
contribution_requirements: Direct push to main branch. No PR required.
key_patterns: Zustand store (src/store/gameStore.ts) holds all game state. Pure functions in src/utils/gameLogic.ts handle state transitions. Types defined in src/types/game.ts with CLANS, REGIONS_DATA, SEASON_CARDS, MONSTERS, WAR_POEMS constants. Components in src/components/. Single CSS file at src/App.css. SVG assets in public/.
directory_structure: Root: package.json, vite.config.ts, tsconfig*.json, index.html. src/: App.tsx, App.css, main.tsx. src/types/: game.ts (types + constants). src/utils/: gameLogic.ts (pure logic). src/store/: gameStore.ts (Zustand). src/components/: all UI components. src/server/: WebSocket server (index.ts). public/: static assets (SVGs, favicon).
